memberdef.name: F32ToI16U64Obj_getset
F32ToI16U64ObjType
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT(NULL, 0) .tp_name = "cvt.F32ToI16U64", .tp_basicsize = sizeof(F32ToI16U64Object), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)F32ToI16U64Obj_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "F32ToI16U64 type.", .tp_methods = F32ToI16U64Obj_methods, .tp_getset = F32ToI16U64Obj_getset, .tp_new = F32ToI16U64Obj_new, .tp_init = (initproc)F32ToI16U64Obj_init, }
